query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A wide panoramic photograph of rolling mountain ridges extending across the horizon beneath a sky filled with thick, layered clouds. The foreground consists of dense vegetation with light-colored branches and foliage, while multiple tiers of blue-gray peaks fade into haze toward the background. The cloud formations range from dark gray masses to lighter sheets where they meet the mountain silhouette.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A wide panoramic photograph of rolling mountain ridges beneath thick, layered clouds, rendered in a muted, faded palette of desaturated grays and washed-out blues with low vibrancy. The foreground consists of dense vegetation with pale, light-colored branches and foliage, while multiple tiers of peaks fade into haze. The dark cloud cover and bleak tonal choices evoke an atmosphere of distress and unease across the landscape.
